Orientation: Saturday 10:00 AM

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=volunteer-project
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 1 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The expected unfinished change is missing."
[ -f "$repo/assignments.txt" ] || fail 'assignments.txt is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/assignments.txt")" = 'Volunteer assignments

Welcome table: Sam
Training desk: Riley' ] || fail 'assignments.txt does not contain the required text.'

fixtureFiles.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -eu
rm -rf -- volunteer-project
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
git -C volunteer-project init -q -b main
git -C volunteer-project config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner'
git -C volunteer-project config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s '# Volunteer Project

Assignments and meeting times.
' > volunteer-project/README.md
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Volunteer assignments

Welcome table: Sam
Training desk: unassigned
' > volunteer-project/assignments.txt
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Volunteer meeting times

Orientation: Saturday 10:00 AM
' > volunteer-project/meeting-times.txt
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Old volunteer notes

Call list from last season.
' > volunteer-project/old-notes.txt
git -C volunteer-project add -A
GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-project commit -q -m 'Start volunteer project'

starterFiles.content:
# Volunteer Project

Orientation: Saturday 9:30 AM

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=volunteer-project
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 2 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The expected unfinished change is missing."
expected_staged=$(printf "%s\n" meeting-times.txt | sort)
actual_staged=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | sort)
[ "$actual_staged" = "$expected_staged" ] || fail "The staged file set is not correct."
[ -f "$repo/meeting-times.txt" ] || fail 'meeting-times.txt is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/meeting-times.txt")" = 'Volunteer meeting times

Orientation: Saturday 9:30 AM' ] || fail 'meeting-times.txt does not contain the required text.'

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -eu
rm -rf -- volunteer-project
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
git -C volunteer-project init -q -b main
git -C volunteer-project config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner'
git -C volunteer-project config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s '# Volunteer Project

Assignments and meeting times.
' > volunteer-project/README.md
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Volunteer assignments

Welcome table: Sam
Training desk: unassigned
' > volunteer-project/assignments.txt
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Volunteer meeting times

Orientation: Saturday 10:00 AM
' > volunteer-project/meeting-times.txt
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Old volunteer notes

Call list from last season.
' > volunteer-project/old-notes.txt
git -C volunteer-project add -A
GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-project commit -q -m 'Start volunteer project'
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Volunteer assignments

Welcome table: Sam
Training desk: Riley
' > volunteer-project/assignments.txt
git -C volunteer-project add -A
GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-project commit -q -m 'Update volunteer assignments'
mkdir -p -- volunteer-project
printf %s 'Volunteer meeting times

Orientation: Saturday 9:30 AM
' > volunteer-project/meeting-times.txt
git -C volunteer-project add -A
GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-project commit -q -m 'Update volunteer meeting time'
